history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed game-style interface shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner with level and progress details for a user.

Main Subject:
At the center-top, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in gold. In the main panel, the username “qilaa” is shown with a small circular badge containing “#1”. Below that, a rectangular progress area shows “LEVEL 6” on the left and “EXPERIENCE 20 / 350” on the right. A horizontal progress bar sits underneath with a small purple dot at the left side and “5%” displayed to the right. Three smaller labeled tiles near the bottom read “MESSAGES 173”, “XP NEEDED 330”, and “NEXT LVL 7”.

Setting:
The image appears to be a UI screen on a dark background with purple and blue tones and a rounded rectangular card centered in the frame. Lighting and style suggest a digital interface rather than a physical environment.

Visual Details:
The color palette is mostly dark navy and purple with gold highlights for the “LEVEL UP!” header. The main container is a large rounded rectangle with a subtle border. The left side includes a circular avatar image with anime-style artwork inside a purple ring, while the rest of the panel contains text and UI elements. The progress bar is a dark horizontal bar with a purple filled section near the left and a small purple circular marker. The camera angle is straight-on, and the layout is centered with evenly spaced elements.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
qilaa
#1
LEVEL 6
EXPERIENCE 20 / 350
5%
MESSAGES 173
XP NEEDED 330
NEXT LVL 7
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image displays a “level up” dashboard-style interface with a username, ranking badge, and level/progress statistics. It also includes message count, remaining experience needed, and the next level number.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
